gaps.claim: Deterministic routing, cache tiers, and baseline comparison are executable.
gaps.next_action: Keep as regression gate in scripts/run-local-proofs.sh.
gaps.remaining: None for the CI-safe control-plane proof.

gaps.claim: 1,000-agent locality simulation supports the hot-set premise.
gaps.next_action: Use production traces or a public trace if one becomes available.
gaps.remaining: Needs real production traces before claiming traffic realism.

gaps.claim: Learned routing can beat keyword routing on synonym-heavy prompts.
gaps.next_action: Build or adapt a public labeled routing benchmark.
gaps.remaining: Needs larger public benchmark routing labels before publication-grade claims.

gaps.claim: A real local neural backend can consume routed specialist context.
gaps.next_action: Keep separate from LoRA claims in paper wording.
gaps.remaining: Context injection is not adapter-weight specialization.

gaps.claim: Apple Silicon vLLM-Metal can serve multiple LoRA adapters.
gaps.next_action: Track upstream vLLM-Metal support or design a Metal-specific tiering alternative.
gaps.remaining: Metal still does not implement CPU LoRA cache tiering with max_cpu_loras > max_loras.

gaps.claim: CUDA vLLM accepts max_cpu_loras > max_loras and serves multiple LoRA adapters.
gaps.next_action: Run longer external CUDA/SGLang proof on controlled NVIDIA hardware.
gaps.remaining: Bounded Kaggle T4 run; not a production capacity result.

gaps.claim: High-quality domain adapters beat the base model on a sufficiently large benchmark.
gaps.next_action: Run a larger CUDA GSM8K/public benchmark (>=30 items, preferably full split or repeated seeds) and keep or train/select a stronger math adapter before publication-grade quality claims.
gaps.remaining: A bounded CUDA GSM8K run shows expert > base, but the sample is below the >=30-item threshold for a quality-superiority claim.

gaps.claim: Production-scale concurrency and capacity are characterized.
gaps.next_action: Run >=1000 requests with saturation curves on controlled GPU hardware.
gaps.remaining: Current concurrency runs are small hosted/local smoke tests.

gaps.claim: vLLM-Metal supports upstream-style CPU LoRA cache tiering.
gaps.next_action: Wait for upstream support, contribute implementation, or document a Metal-specific design alternative.
gaps.remaining: vLLM-Metal raises NotImplementedError for max_cpu_loras > max_loras.
